sections.a_eyebrow: Scroll-Triggered · Heavy Motion · Moderate Motion · Engaging · Modern
sections.a_description: Elements that fade, slide, and scale into existence as you scroll — Scroll-Triggered Effects design choreographs the reading experience so that content doesn't just sit on the page but performs its entrance. The clean backgrounds and professional typography provide a stable foundation, while indigo accents mark the interactive moments where static layouts transform into dynamic experiences.

This motion-enhanced style powers SaaS landing pages, product feature tours, startup homepages, and technology showcases. You'll see it on framework documentation sites, design tool marketing pages, and fintech platforms — anywhere that uses the Intersection Observer API or scroll libraries to transform a standard page into a choreographed reveal of features, benefits, and calls to action.

a_image_cover.alt: Scroll-Triggered Effects style use case illustration
Scroll-Triggered Effects style use case illustration
Scroll-Triggered Effects style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The polished, reveal-on-scroll aesthetic of modern interactive websites — elements that fade, slide, and scale into view as the user scrolls, creating a choreographed content experience. Background: clean white (#ffffff) with a subtle warm undertone. The .inner panel has a light gray background (#f8fafc) with a 1px border (#e2e8f0) that creates clear content sections — each section a stage for scroll-triggered entrance. Colors: indigo (#6366f1) as the primary accent — modern, tech-forward, and visually satisfying as elements animate into place. Dark slate (#0f172a) for headings, medium slate (#475569) for body text. The aesthetic is professional yet dynamic — static content that comes alive through motion. Set in DM Sans — clean, geometric, modern, perfect for tech-forward interactive experiences. Heading at weight 700, 26px, line-height 1.3, letter-spacing -0.3px, color #0f172a. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #6366f1. Body at weight 400, 15px, line-height 1.7, color #475569. Buttons: primary — indigo (#6366f1), white text, 8px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, indigo border. Alternatives: Plus Jakarta Sans (modern geometric), Satoshi (clean contemporary).
